name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_source_zone_fire_writeback_mcw
description: Fuel writeback repair proof-shape correction: saved-world f_brazier/log source plus SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone footing, pre-wielded charged lighter, explicit stale item-info/JSON view dismissal to normal map UI, normal player activation/targeting, post-target action-path message/OCR guard before any save/fd_fire audit, direct save-mtime proof, and guarded saved fd_fire/smoke/light-relevant writeback. No debug fd_fire, no synthetic map fields, no inventory/wield selector claim.

steps.label: source_zone_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-zone fuel repair fixture is loaded on the map before activation/targeting runs.

steps.label: dismiss_stale_item_json_view_to_map
steps.abort_reason: after dismissing the stale item-info/JSON view, OCR did not show the normal map UI marker; do not type activation/targeting through an unknown screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: Escape dismisses the stale item-info/JSON view from the loaded save and returns to normal map UI before activation; this is a screen-state guard, not feature closure.

steps.label: audit_saved_player_has_wielded_charged_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player state has a lighter already wielded with nested butane charge before the proof begins
steps.preconditions: fixture transform pre-wielded a charged lighter; this proves setup state only, not inventory/wield UI
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit normal activation unless saved weapon state is lighter with charge
steps.abort_reason: saved-player weapon is not charged lighter before source-zone fire proof

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_brazier_logs
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains f_brazier plus real log item metadata before ignition
steps.preconditions: fixture/source save provides the brazier and save_transform adds oversized logs; no fd_fire was injected
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit source-zone repair unless real saved-world brazier/log footing is present
steps.abort_reason: saved-world brazier/log source missing before lighter/fire proof

steps.label: audit_saved_source_firewood_zone_for_logs
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved zone metadata contains a broad SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone covering the brazier/log target and adjacent source area
steps.preconditions: fixture save_transform added a SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone over/around the log pile; this is fuel footing only, not Smart Zone Manager closure
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit source-zone repair unless saved zone metadata covers the brazier/log source area
steps.abort_reason: saved SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone metadata missing before lighter/fire proof

steps.label: audit_player_message_log_before_source_zone_ignition
steps.expected_visible_fact: baseline the saved player message log before normal pre-wielded-lighter activation so the post-target guard captures only new action-path lines
steps.failure_rule: baseline only; this does not prove ignition or writeback

steps.label: activate_pre_wielded_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: The normal player Activate-wielded-item command is sent with lighter already wielded; this should open/enter the firestarter target flow.

steps.label: target_source_zone_brazier_logs_with_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: The normal firestarter target flow is aimed at the east brazier/log/source-zone tile and confirms source-firewood / adjacent-container safety prompts if they appear.
steps.failure_rule: if normal targeting does not lead to fd_fire metadata after save, activation/targeting remains unproven
steps.next_step_gate: the saved fd_fire audit is the required gate before claiming player-lit fire

steps.label: advance_firestarter_activity_to_completion
steps.expected_visible_fact: A bounded turn advance lets any normal firestarter activity complete and captures OCR before save; depleted-lighter/no-ignition text red-blocks here.
steps.abort_reason: post-target/advance OCR shows depleted-lighter or no-ignition text; do not proceed into save/mtime/fd_fire writeback after a failed ignition action
steps.next_step_gate: do not request save or fd_fire audit unless the following player-message guard sees a decisive ignition line

steps.label: audit_player_message_log_source_zone_ignition_success
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-target action-path guard: a narrow saved player-message bridge proves the normal activation/targeting step actually ignited fire before any save/mtime/fd_fire audit is attempted
steps.preconditions: normal pre-wielded lighter activation, east brazier/log/source-zone targeting, and bounded firestarter turn advance just ran; baseline player-message log was recorded before activation
steps.next_step_gate: only proceed to save/mtime/fd_fire writeback if a real ignition line such as You successfully light a fire. is present
steps.abort_reason: no decisive normal-ignition player-message line appeared after targeting/advance; save/mtime/fd_fire audit would only launder a failed or depleted-lighter action

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_source_zone_ignition_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after normal lighter/firestarter targeting and before the post-ignition save is requested

steps.label: request_direct_save_after_source_zone_ignition
steps.expected_visible_fact: The Save command is requested after ignition; no OCR prompt proof is credited, only the following mtime gate.

steps.label: confirm_direct_save_after_source_zone_ignition
steps.failure_rule: the uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: feature proof may proceed only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_source_zone_ignition_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: The direct save confirmation is sent; acceptance is proven by mtime advance, not OCR.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_source_zone_ignition_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after the post-ignition save confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-ignition save, proving the following saved-map audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_fd_fire
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains f_brazier plus actual fd_fire metadata after normal pre-wielded-lighter player action
steps.preconditions: previous step saved after normal player activation/targeting; no debug fd_fire transform is present in the fixture
steps.next_step_gate: player-lit fire/light writeback cannot close unless this metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: fd_fire target metadata missing after source-zone normal ignition route

steps.label: bounded_wait_for_smoke_light_and_bandit_signal
steps.expected_visible_fact: A bounded post-fire advance gives smoke/light signal scanning a chance to run after fd_fire writeback is proven.

steps.label: audit_saved_nearby_tile_for_smoke_or_fire_state
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved nearby tiles contain fd_smoke after a bounded live fire observation window, while fd_fire remains the light source evidence
steps.preconditions: fd_fire writeback row was green before this optional smoke-relevance audit
steps.next_step_gate: if smoke is missing, report fd_fire/light green but smoke not fully closed; do not launder it into full smoke proof
steps.abort_reason: fd_smoke metadata missing after source-zone normal ignition route

recommended_test_command: python3 tools/openclaw_harness/startup_harness.py probe bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_source_zone_fire_writeback_mcw (post-Frau correction: pre-wielded charged lighter + post-target message/OCR ignition guard before save/mtime/fd_fire; no wield-selector proof claim)
